ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
Denied. Plaintiff has raised triable issues of material facts as to negligence and causation through her expert's declarations, the objections to which are overruled. Prevailing party to submit a form of order in compliance with CCP 437C(g). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Court Reporter: Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
